entries.name: Landslide
entries.desc: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Obsidian Scales
entries.desc: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.

entries.name: Expunge
entries.desc: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

entries.name: Natural Convergence
entries.desc: Disintegrate channels 20% faster.

entries.name: Heavy Wingbeats
entries.desc: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

entries.name: Verdant Embrace
entries.desc: Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.

entries.name: Forger of Mountains
entries.desc: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

entries.name: Innate Magic
entries.desc: Essence regenerates 5% faster.

entries.name: Obsidian Bulwark
entries.desc: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

entries.name: Enkindled
entries.desc: Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.

entries.name: Scarlet Adaptation
entries.desc: Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

entries.name: Inner Radiance
entries.desc: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.

entries.name: Recall
entries.desc: You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

entries.name: Clobbering Sweep
entries.desc: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

entries.name: Tailwind
entries.desc: Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.

entries.name: Cauterizing Flame
entries.desc: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.

entries.name: Ancient Flame
entries.desc: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.

entries.name: Instinctive Arcana
entries.desc: Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Tip the Scales
entries.desc: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

entries.name: Attuned to the Dream
entries.desc: Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.

entries.name: Sleep Walk
entries.desc: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

entries.name: Protracted Talons
entries.desc: Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.

entries.name: Inherent Resistance
entries.desc: Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.

entries.name: Draconic Legacy
entries.desc: Your Stamina is increased by 6%.

entries.name: Extended Flight
entries.desc: Hover lasts 4 sec longer.

entries.name: Bountiful Bloom
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.

entries.name: Regenerative Magic
entries.desc: Your Leech is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Blast Furnace
entries.desc: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

entries.name: Exuberance
entries.desc: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Renewing Blaze
entries.desc: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.

entries.name: Walloping Blow
entries.desc: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Panacea
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.

entries.name: Stretch Time
entries.desc: While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.

entries.name: Unravel
entries.desc: Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,535 additional Spellfrost damage to them.

entries.name: Oppressing Roar
entries.desc: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.

entries.name: Foci of Life
entries.desc: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

entries.name: Rescue
entries.desc: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

entries.name: Lush Growth
entries.desc: Green spells restore 5% more health.

entries.name: Source of Magic
entries.desc: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

entries.name: Strike from Above
entries.desc: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

entries.name: Leaping Flames
entries.desc: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

entries.name: Overawe
entries.desc: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Aerial Mastery
entries.desc: Hover gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Twin Guardian
entries.desc: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

entries.name: Potent Mana
entries.desc: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

entries.name: Terror of the Skies
entries.desc: Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.

entries.name: Time Spiral
entries.desc: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

entries.name: Spatial Paradox
entries.desc:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

entries.name: Zephyr
entries.desc: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Ebon Might
entries.desc:
Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by 8.0% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, Deep Breath, and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

entries.name: Eruption
entries.desc: Cause a violent eruption beneath an enemy's feet, dealing 1,064 Volcanic damage split between them and nearby enemies.

entries.name: Essence Burst
entries.desc: Your Living Flame has a 20% chance, and your Azure Strike has a 15% chance, to make your next Eruption cost no Essence.

entries.name: Quell
entries.desc: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

entries.name: Ricocheting Pyroclast
entries.desc: Eruption deals 30% more damage per enemy struck, up to 150%.

entries.name: Essence Attunement
entries.desc: Essence Burst stacks 2 times.

entries.name: Pupil of Alexstrasza
entries.desc: When cast at an enemy, Living Flame strikes 1 additional enemy for 100% damage.

entries.name: Echoing Strike
entries.desc: Azure Strike deals 15% increased damage and has a 10% chance per target hit to echo, casting again.

entries.name: Upheaval
entries.desc:
Gather earthen power beneath your enemy's feet and send them hurtling upwards, dealing 1,664 Volcanic damage to the target and nearby enemies.

Empowering expands the area of effect.

I:   3 yd radius.

II:  6 yd radius.

III: 9 yd radius.

entries.name: Breath of Eons
entries.desc:
Fly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec.

Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying.

 Temporal Wound
15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.

Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

entries.name: Defy Fate
entries.desc:
Fatal attacks are diverted into a nearby timeline, preventing the damage, and your death, in this one.

The release of temporal energy restores 9,889 health to you, and 3,276 to 4 nearby allies, over 9 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

May only occur once every 6 min.

entries.name: Ignition Rush
entries.desc: Essence Burst reduces the cast time of Eruption by 40% and increases its damage by 20%.

entries.name: Power Nexus
entries.desc: Increases your maximum Essence to 6.

entries.name: Volcanism
entries.desc: Eruption's Essence cost is reduced by 1.

entries.name: Perilous Fate
entries.desc: Breath of Eons reduces enemies' movement speed by 70%, and reduces their attack speed by 50%, for 10 sec.

entries.name: Chrono Ward
entries.desc: When allies deal damage with Temporal Wounds, they gain a shield for 100% of the damage dealt. Absorption cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Bestow Weyrnstone
entries.desc:
Conjure a pair of Weyrnstones, one for your target ally and one for yourself. Only one ally may bear your Weyrnstone at a time.

A Weyrnstone can be activated by the bearer to transport them to the other Weyrnstone's location, if they are within 100 yds.

entries.name: Timelessness
entries.desc:
Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.

entries.name: Improved Defy Fate
entries.desc: Defy Fate healing increased by 100% and its cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

entries.name: Blistering Scales
entries.desc:
Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing 114 Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

entries.name: Draconic Attunements
entries.desc:
Learn to attune yourself to the essence of the Black or Bronze Dragonflights:

Black Attunement: You and your 4 nearest allies have 2% increased maximum health.

Bronze Attunement:You and your 4 nearest allies have 10% increased movement speed.

entries.name: Prescience
entries.desc:
Grant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% for 18 sec.

Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted.

entries.name: Unyielding Domain
entries.desc: Upheaval cannot be interrupted, and has an additional 10% chance to critically strike.

entries.name: Tectonic Locus
entries.desc: Upheaval deals 50% increased damage to the primary target, and launches them higher.

entries.name: Regenerative Chitin
entries.desc: Blistering Scales no longer loses charges and deals 20% more damage.

entries.name: Molten Blood
entries.desc: When cast, Blistering Scales grants the target a shield that absorbs up to 4,560 damage for 30 sec based on their missing health. Lower health targets gain a larger shield.

entries.name: Momentum Shift
entries.desc: Consuming Essence Burst grants you 5% Intellect for 6 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

entries.name: Aspects' Favor
entries.desc:
Obsidian Scales activates Black Attunement, and amplifies it to increase maximum health by 4.0% for 12 sec.

Hover activates Bronze Attunement, and amplifies it to increase movement speed by 25% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Arcane Reach
entries.desc: The range of your helpful magics is increased by 5 yards.

entries.name: Fate Mirror
entries.desc: Prescience grants the ally a chance for their spells and abilities to echo their damage or healing, dealing 15% of the amount again.

entries.name: Symbiotic Bloom
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom increases targets' healing received by 3% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Reactive Hide
entries.desc: Each time Blistering Scales explodes it deals 15% more damage for 12 sec, stacking 10 times.

entries.name: Font of Magic
entries.desc: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.

entries.name: Hoarded Power
entries.desc: Essence Burst has a 20% chance to not be consumed.

entries.name: Motes of Possibility
entries.desc: Eruption has a 25% chance to form a mote of diverted essence near you. Allies who comes in contact with the mote gain a random buff from your arsenal.

entries.name: Anachronism
entries.desc: Prescience has a 35% chance to grant Essence Burst.

entries.name: Prolong Life
entries.desc: Your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Symbiotic Bloom.

entries.name: Dream of Spring
entries.desc: Emerald Blossom no longer has a cooldown, deals 35% increased healing, and increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1 sec, but costs 3 Essence.

entries.name: Accretion
entries.desc: Eruption reduces the remaining cooldown of Upheaval by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Imminent Destruction
entries.desc: Deep Breath reduces the Essence cost of your next 6 Eruptions by 1.

entries.name: Time Skip
entries.desc: Surge forward in time, causing your cooldowns to recover 1,000% faster for 2 sec.

entries.name: Clairvoyant
entries.desc: Motes of Possibility may now grant Prescience to allies and have a 10% increased chance to activate.

entries.name: Inferno's Blessing
entries.desc: Fire Breath grants the inferno's blessing for 8 sec to you and a nearby ally, giving their damaging attacks and spells a high chance to deal an additional 1,022 Fire damage.

entries.name: Rumbling Earth
entries.desc: Upheaval causes an aftershock at its location, dealing 30% of its damage 2 additional times.

entries.name: Plot the Future
entries.desc: Deep Breath grants you Fury of the Aspects for 15 sec after you land, without causing Exhaustion.

entries.name: Tomorrow, Today
entries.desc: Time Skip channels for 1 sec longer.

entries.name: Interwoven Threads
entries.desc: The cooldowns of your spells are reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Overlord
entries.desc: Deep Breath casts an Eruption at the first 3 enemies struck. These Eruptions have a 100% chance to create a Mote of Possibility.

entries.name: Mighty Inferno
entries.desc: Inferno's Blessing's damage is increased by 40%, and your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Inferno's Blessing.

entries.name: Duplicate
entries.desc: Breath of Eons summons a version of you from the future to assist you in battle, lasting 20 sec. Your duplicate casts Eruption, Fire Breath, and Upheaval.
